ideas.description: Build seamlessly integrated suite of business applications sharing underlying platform capabilities like permissions, analytics, and workflow automations rather than narrow point solutions.

ideas.description: Robotics and automation for data center construction and operations. Massive labor shortage constraining buildout. Automate wiring, installation, maintenance.

ideas.description: As AI coding makes engineering 10x faster, PM becomes bottleneck. Build tools for rapid user research simulation, AI-simulated user groups, instant prototyping.
